ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ring_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ring size entry. */,
  "finger_circumference_mm" REAL /* Finger circumference measurement in millimeters. */,
  "ring_diameter_mm" REAL /* Diameter of the ring measurement in millimeters. */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* Size according to the European sizing standard. */,
  "usa_uk_size" TEXT /* Size according to USA/UK sizing standard. */,
  "italy_size" INTEGER /* Size according to Italian sizing standard. */,
  "japan_size" TEXT /* Size according to Japan sizing standard. */,
  "china_size" TEXT /* Size according to China sizing standard. */,
  "korea_size" TEXT /* Size according to Korea sizing standard. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the size was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the size was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product. */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product. */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., ring, bracelet, necklace). */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with the product. */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product. */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product. */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer. */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name. */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address. */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number. */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's mailing address. */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city. */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state. */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country. */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Customer's postal code. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the customer was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order. */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order. */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed. */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed). */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order. */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the order was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item. */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which this item belongs. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered. */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered. */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order. */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discount applied to the product. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the order item was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the order item was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing guide. */,
  "guide_name" TEXT /* Name of the sizing guide. */,
  "guide_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sizing guide. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sizing guide was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sizing guide was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size history entry. */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ring size entry that was updated. */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the size recommendation was updated. */,
  "previous_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous size recommendation. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the size history was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the size history was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_previous_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_size_id") REFERENCES ring_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry. */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who entered the measurement. */,
  "finger_circumference_mm" REAL /* Measurement of the finger circumference in millimeters. */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return. */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the return. */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed. */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the return was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the return was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory. */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently available. */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold at which the product needs to be reordered. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed. */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review. */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer. */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer. */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the review was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry. */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who created the wishlist. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the wishlist. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the wishlist was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the wishlist was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the promotion. */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion. */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered. */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion. */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion. */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was created. */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the promotion was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the image. */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
